question: Has the image canvas been expanded horizontally on both the left and right sides?
Does the newly generated content on the expanded sides extend the room naturally without stretching or blurring?
Have the dad (man in blue) and mom (woman in white) been completely removed from their original positions behind the sofa?
Is the dad now standing beside the grandparents on one side of the sofa?
Is the mom now standing beside the grandparents on the opposite side of the sofa from the dad?
Are all adult family members now arranged in a single horizontal row relative to the camera?
Are the full bodies, including previously occluded legs and feet, of the dad and mom now visible?
Do the repositioned dad and mom appear at the correct scale and depth, appearing to stand on the same plane as the seated grandparents?
Is the Christmas tree and wall background seamlessly reconstructed where the dad and mom originally stood?
Is the top of the sofa backrest clean and free of ghosting artifacts or remnants of the parents?
Are the grandparents still seated on the sofa in their original poses and positions?
Is the young boy sitting on the floor preserved without distortion or unintended movement?
Are the original environmental details (fireplace, stockings, rug, and unoccluded parts of the tree) preserved?
Do the newly generated lower bodies of the parents appear anatomically natural and proportional?
Do the parents' feet appear to make natural contact with the floor/rug (grounding)?
Is the lighting on the repositioned dad and mom consistent with the room's warm ambient lighting?
Is the image free from visible seams, floating limbs, or duplicate figures?
Are the faces and bodies of the repositioned subjects sharp and clear, matching the original image quality?
